name: Lemon Feather Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat the egg yolks and sugar with an electric mixer for 3 to 4 minutes until thick and lemon-colored. Set aside.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk the sour cream, milk, lemon extract, and lemon zest into the egg yolk mixture.
3. Sift the dry ingredients (baking soda, salt, and nutmeg) into another bowl and set aside.
4. Using clean beaters, beat the egg whites until they hold soft peaks.
5. Whisk the dry ingredients into the liquid mixture until just smooth.
6. Gently fold in the egg whites to combine.
7. Cook the cakes on a preheated greased griddle or skillet for about 1 1/2 minutes per side, then flip and cook for another 1 1/2 minutes on the second side.
8. Serve with warm blueberry sauce and whipped cream.
